name: International Loans & Jewelers
description_short: International Loans & Jewelers in North Miami offers jewelry services and financial solutions with a focus on engagement ring creation. The locally-owned shop maintains a 71.5% positivity score based on 7 customer reviews.
description_long:
International Loans & Jewelers has established itself as a long-standing presence in the North Miami community, serving customers at 13200 W Dixie Hwy since its founding. The business operates under the ownership of Tania Marzouka and maintains extended hours across six days per week (closed Sundays). Customer feedback indicates the store has built some local trust, with positive reviews highlighting its reliability and longevity in the area.

The shop specializes in custom engagement ring creation and jewelry services, leveraging partnerships with platforms like Jeweler AI by Willyou.com to help customers find diamonds and design personalized pieces. Beyond jewelry retail, the company offers financial solutions aligned with its pawn shop classification, though specific loan terms and rates are not detailed on the available website content. The store maintains a welcoming environment for customers seeking personalized jewelry consultations.

The business distinguishes itself through its dual focus on high-end jewelry design and financial services in a single location. Its long-standing operational history in North Miami suggests established community relationships, and positive customer testimonials reference the store's trusted reputation developed over many years of operation. The 71.5% positivity score reflects generally favorable customer sentiment, though with notable exceptions.

Prospective customers should note that the company received mixed reviews across Yelp, Google, and Facebook. While some customers appreciate the friendly service and reliability, others have reported poor customer service experiences, including instances of abrupt communication during phone inquiries. With only 7 reviews forming the basis of the positivity assessment, the sample size is relatively small. Customers considering engagement ring purchases or financial services should verify specific terms, pricing, and service policies directly with the business before proceeding.
address: 13200 W Dixie Hwy, North Miami, FL 33161

pros: Long-standing presence in North Miami community with established customer trust
Specializes in custom engagement ring creation with personalized design services
Integrated with Jeweler AI platform to help customers compare diamonds and designs
Extended operating hours (11:30 AM – 5:30 PM) six days per week for customer convenience
Locally owned and operated shop with individual business ownership
Friendly service noted by positive customer reviews
Combines jewelry retail with financial solutions in a single location
cons: Low review volume (7 reviews) limits reliability of customer sentiment assessment
Reported instances of poor phone communication with customers hanging up abruptly
Only 57% of reviews are definitively positive, with 29% neutral and 14% negative
Specific loan terms, rates, and financial service details not disclosed on website
Limited information about pawn services and collateral-based loan offerings
best_for: North Miami area residents seeking custom engagement ring design and consultation
Customers who prefer working with locally-owned jewelry shops with community history
Those combining jewelry purchases with potential short-term financial needs
diagnosis: International Loans & Jewelers is best suited for North Miami residents seeking custom engagement ring design from a locally-established jeweler, or those needing collateral-based financial solutions. The main caveat is inconsistent customer service experiences—while the shop maintains community longevity and some positive reviews, documented instances of poor phone communication and a mixed overall sentiment (71.5%) warrant direct verification of services and terms before committing to significant purchases.
services: Custom engagement ring creation and design
Access to Jeweler AI comparative diamond shopping tool
